internal_issues.description: WIN-028 c4 defense_survives=3 neutralized by EXP-298. 15.6% deviation anchored to dome own thresholds (WIN-029 5.3%, WIN-027 R^2=0.7874, WIN-030 48.6%), 180 degree framing reframed as charitable steelman, unfalsifiability argument added, arc-direction calc explicit.
WIN-050 c4: Newtonian falloff assumption now explicitly stated with burden-of-proof framing. Sentence added after 1.48% figure.
WIN-050 c4: Lunar declination +/-28.6 degrees corrected to nodal cycle range (18.3 to 28.6 over 18.6 year cycle).
WIN-050 c4: Doodson count hedged to ~390 with Doodson 1921 citation.
WIN-050 c4: Opening sentence tightened to specify declination-cycle mechanism.
